text.title: Critical-Issue Triage Protocol Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs to procedure to output for a typical instance of Critical-Issue Triage Protocol.

example.scenario: After a 5-user mobile usability session, the founder finds 7 issues. The triage rules score 1 sev-4 (a11y contrast on Add-to-Cart), 1 sev-3, 3 sev-2, 2 sev-1. Two are REVENUE-CRITICAL +1 modifier; matrix routes 2 to same-day-fix, 3 to next-sprint, 2 to backlog. Owner Ruslan signs the artefact.
example.trace: r1-severity-scale-0-4 → r2-frequency-band-not-count → r3-context-modifier-applied → r4-action-matrix-deterministic → triage stored
